curation_scope: Pharmacogene sample-evidence requirements derived from PharmCAT public documentation and source-specific caller boundaries.

requirements: CYP2D6 diplotype, phenotype, or activity evidence from a caller that handles structural variation and copy number variation.
Outside-call formatting compatible with PharmCAT when recommendations should be generated through PharmCAT.
Clinical synthesis using guideline or label source evidence plus the outside sample call.

preferred_evidence: typing resolution appropriate to the medication/guideline
requirements: HLA allele typing from a specialized HLA caller.

Clinical synthesis using guideline or label source evidence plus the outside sample call.

preferred_evidence: outside diplotype or phenotype when available
requirements: MT-RNR1 genotype or phenotype evidence from an appropriate mitochondrial variant call source.

supports: outside diplotype, phenotype, and activity score formatting
source_documents.title: PharmCAT Outside Call Format

requirements: Confirm chrX genotype representation for samples with one X chromosome.
Use haploid representation when the sample should be haploid on chrX.
Inspect PharmCAT output and source guideline context before synthesis.
